rulings.Case Title: ORIT YOUNESSIAN VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re Notice Of Motion & Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, DECEMBER 27, 2007, LINE 6. PLAINTIFF ORIT YOUNESSIAN'S (Re- NoticeD) Motion For Preliminary Injunction IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING AND THE EQUITIES FAVOR DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS ONE, THREE AND FIVE ARE SUSTAINED; OBJECTIONS TWO, FOUR AND SIX ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/VC)
